metaDescription: Voiceawareness offers expert psychological therapy for adults, focusing on psychotherapy services and mindfulness practices to improve your mental health.
footerAbout: Voice Awareness Psychotherapy Services Inc. is a Canada based company. Let the Voices Be Heard ! is our moto. We provide therapy and services to individuals, family or groups in broad areas including but not limited to Trauma Therapy, Mindfulness Therapy, IFS Therapy, EDMR Therapy. Our therapeutic treatments are authentic to relieve our clients from symptoms of loneliness, helplessness, insecurity, shame, guilt, fear, grief, anger, depression, anxiety. Our services are offered by a highly qualified registered psychotherapist.

services.title: Stress Management
services.summary: I provide personalized stress management psychotherapy sessions to manage and alleviate the pressures of stress causing factors leading to a joyful life with purpose.

services.title: Cope With Relationship Trauma
services.summary: Relationship trauma can be multi symptomatic and complex. I offer theurapetic techniques to create an opportunity for individuals or couples to process their thoughts and feelings, identify common grounds, and expand support system

services.title: Drive Emotional Stability
services.summary: Experiencing intensely low or high emotions related to your temperament, surrounding environment or trauma? I can help you learn emotion regulation skills.

services.title: Enhance Personal Growth
services.summary: Your personal growth can mean a lot of things. As your personal therapist I will identify such things as road blocks in your life, and trigger the process of self awareness and personal evolution that helps you finally break through a creative block.
